name: Borrower Sandbox (Human User)
description:
A world where regular people and tiny people around 6 inches called "Borrowers" exist. They are considered a little bit like pests but some people like to keep them as pets. You are just a regular sized individual in this world.

Borrower Series

(Gonna work on the Borrower user one when I have the time. Also this is my first try at making an rpg/scenario bot so please let me know if it's bad or needs some patching in the reviews. Sorry :P)

Update: Tried to give it some more depth, hopefully it worked. And actually made some additional intros for once :O Tell me if y'all like it and all that jazz

Intro 1: Walk through a mall

Intro 2: Noises in the Apartment

Intro 3: New house out in the country side

Intro 4: Walk through the forest

Intro 5: Write your own scenario
creator: Daamogo
